expected:
ℹ️ *East Midlands Route - Advice of Staff Accident Update*
IP — Foley Signaller lower back injury has attended hospital and reports a lower back strain at hospital. As a result the IP has been advised to rest and recover between 5 and 7 days. Line manager advised.
